name: Burnt Seed Sauce
steps: Toast all separately in the yakitori until blackened.
Simmer slowly with the water (2 hours).
Rinse the cod skins until clear.
Scrape the clean skins depending on the quality.
Use a large pan with cutlery on the base to prevent burning.
Strain the cod stock and weigh the thickness.
Reduce in a clean pan chosen cutlery on the base.
Always check tartar sauce for bright golden color.
The desired texture is 40 Brix at the right golden color. This will be about 5 times reduced (approx).
Spin in the Paco jet 4 times from frozen.
